description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a combination of dark and light exterior materials, including wood, concrete, and glass. The front facade features a large covered patio area with outdoor seating, and a prominent balcony on the upper floor with glass railings. The house includes a spacious attached garage on one side, and large windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house has a more private design, with fewer windows and a solid wall section. The property is set on a rectangular grassy plot, bordered by a paved walkway around the perimeter. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wood and concrete exterior, large windows, and an attached garage, set on a grassy plot with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, covered patio, upper balcony, and attached garage.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the patio, main entryway, and symmetrical balcony above.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the garage side, upper balcony, and fewer windows on the back wall.
description_view_3: Rear view with a solid wall, minimal windows, and the full length of the garage visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered patio, wide glass door, and minimalistic overhang with no steps or columns.
